scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix social-media-dashboard-backend && npm install --prefix social-media-dashboard-frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix social-media-dashboard-backend" "npm run dev --prefix social-media-dashboard-frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix social-media-dashboard-backend" "npm run start --prefix social-media-dashboard-frontend -- --host 0.0.0.0"
